description: This file is a web-based user interface for visualizing database contents, including selecting databases, viewing tables, and displaying data with interactive features like expanding cell contents.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list, resetting selections.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands/collapses a database to show its tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads and renders data from a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates HTML for the data table based on fetched records.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual cell content, handling long text and objects.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for better readability.
